text.title: embedding-chunking-strategies Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for embedding-chunking-strategies as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Passing raw documents (entire PDFs, large HTML pages) directly to the embedding API without chunking or token counting.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: OpenAI silently truncates at 8191 tokens. The resulting vector represents only the beginning of the document. Retrieval on long documents fails silently.
